extension.popup.family_hub_subtitle: Get notified when scams are blocked on your loved ones' devices. End-to-end encrypted — even Cleanway can't read the alerts.

extension.popup.family_none_desc: Create one and invite up to 5 others. Or join an existing family using a code.

extension.popup.family_invite_modal_titl: Share this with your family member
extension.popup.family_invite_modal_desc: Both values appear once. After this dialog closes, you can't see them again — generate another invite if needed.
extension.popup.family_join_paste_hint: Tip: paste a Cleanway invite link in the first field — it'll fill in the PIN for you.

extension.welcome.trust_footer: Free forever for blocking. Your data never leaves this device.

landing.account_restore.page_meta_descri: Your account is scheduled for deletion. Restore it during the 30-day grace period to keep your subscription and history.
landing.account_restore.body: You asked us to delete your Cleanway account. We're holding it for 30 days before erasing everything for good — that means your subscription, history, and family memberships are all still here. Click below to bring it back.

landing.account_restore.no_session_body: Your session has expired. Use the same email you signed up with — we'll send a fresh magic link.

landing.account_restore.error_network: Couldn't reach our servers. Please check your connection and retry.
landing.account_restore.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please contact support.
landing.account_restore.footer_note: Changed your mind about restoring? Just close this tab. After 30 days from the original deletion request, your data is permanently wiped automatically.

landing.success.subheading: Your subscription is active. Receipt and welcome email are on the way.
landing.success.step1_body: One click. Cleanway starts checking links instantly.
landing.success.step2_body: iOS and Android. Same protection on the go.

landing.signup.magic_link_sent: We sent a magic-link sign-in to $EMAIL$.
landing.signup.magic_link_followup: Click the link to finish signing in. The page will continue automatically.
landing.signup.footer_lead: We'll email you a one-time sign-in link. No password to remember.
landing.signup.footer_install_tail: — blocking always works without an account.
landing.pricing.hero_subtitle: We believe safety from online scams is a basic right. Block phishing sites — always free. Pay only for details, family protection, and accessibility modes.
landing.transparency.page_description: Cleanway's published numbers: total checks, false-positive rate, response time, intel sources, and government data requests — updated every quarter.
landing.transparency.hero_subtitle: What Cleanway saw and blocked during $PERIOD$.
landing.transparency.error_unavailable: The transparency report is temporarily unavailable. Please refresh in a few minutes.
landing.dns.page_title: Phishing-blocking DNS — one tap, no app
landing.dns.page_description: Install Cleanway's phishing-blocking DNS resolver in 30 seconds on iPhone, Android, Mac or Windows. System-wide protection without a VPN or an app.
landing.dns.hero_title: Block phishing on every app — without installing one
landing.dns.hero_subtitle: Cleanway runs a phishing-blocking DNS resolver. Point your phone or laptop at it and every app on the device — Safari, Chrome, Mail, banking apps — gets the same protection.
landing.dns.hero_meta: Works on iOS 14+, iPadOS 14+, macOS 11+, Android 9+, Windows 11. No VPN. No battery hit.
landing.dns.ios_intro: Tap the button below on your iPhone or iPad. iOS will ask permission to install a configuration profile.
landing.dns.ios_step1: Tap “Allow” when iOS asks to download the profile.
landing.dns.ios_step2: Open Settings → General → VPN & Device Management → Cleanway DNS.
landing.dns.ios_step3: Tap “Install” twice, then enter your device passcode.
landing.dns.ios_unsigned_note: If iOS shows “Unsigned”, that’s expected — Apple’s signing program is paid and we’d rather not pass the cost on to you. The profile itself is unchanged whether it’s signed or not.
landing.dns.android_intro: Android 9 (Pie) and later have built-in DNS-over-TLS — no app required.
landing.dns.android_step1: Open Settings → Network & internet → Private DNS.
landing.dns.android_compat_note: Some Samsung and Xiaomi devices nest the option under Connections → More connection settings. Search “Private DNS” in Settings if you can’t find it.
landing.dns.win_intro: Windows 11 supports DNS-over-HTTPS natively. Earlier Windows versions need a third-party tool like Cloudflare 1.1.1.1 — sorry.
landing.dns.win_step1: Open Settings → Network & internet → Wi-Fi → click your network → DNS server assignment → Edit.
landing.dns.win_step2: Switch to Manual, turn on IPv4, set preferred DNS to 1.1.1.1 with DNS over HTTPS “On (manual template)”.
landing.dns.benefits_heading: What does this protect me from?
landing.dns.benefit_1: Phishing links in SMS, email, and Telegram open as a “site not found” instead of a credential-stealing page.
landing.dns.benefit_2: Malware command-and-control hosts can’t reach your device — even if a sketchy app you installed tries to phone home.
landing.dns.benefit_3: Brand-impersonation domains (paypal-secure-login.com) are blocked at the resolver level — your browser never even loads them.
landing.dns.benefit_4: Works on every app, not just your browser. WhatsApp links, banking apps, in-app browsers — all protected.
landing.dns.privacy_heading: Privacy — what we see and what we don’t
landing.dns.privacy_body: Cleanway DNS resolves the domain only. We never log the queries to disk, never send them to Sentry, never sell them to anyone. Queries stay in memory just long enough to answer the request.
landing.dns.privacy_logs: What we DO keep: an anonymous daily counter of total queries and total blocks, used to publish our quarterly transparency report. No domains, no IPs, no users.
email.common.trust_footer: Cleanway · Protection that stays on your device
email.common.footer_legal: You received this email because you have a Cleanway account.
email.welcome.subject: Welcome to Cleanway — you're protected now
email.welcome.preheader: Every link you see is being checked, automatically.
email.welcome.body_p1: We'll quietly check every link you encounter. The dangerous ones get a red mark — you'll see them before clicking. That's it.
email.welcome.body_p2: Your browsing data never leaves your device. We only check domain names, and your history is yours alone.
email.welcome.cta_scan: Scan my inbox for hidden scams
email.welcome.list_item_1: Automatic link checking on every page you visit
email.welcome.list_item_2: Block dangerous sites before they steal your data
email.welcome.list_item_3: Works across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and your phone
email.welcome.list_item_4: Your data stays on your device — always
email.receipt.subject: Your Cleanway receipt
email.receipt.title: Payment received — thank you
email.receipt.body_p1: Thanks for supporting Cleanway. Your subscription is active.
email.weekly_report.subject: Your week on Cleanway
email.weekly_report.preheader: See what we blocked this week.
email.weekly_report.title: This week, Cleanway protected you from:
email.weekly_report.body_p1: Here's what happened on your devices in the past 7 days.
email.weekly_report.percentile_body: You're safer than {{pct}}% of Cleanway users this week.
email.family_invite.subject: {{name}} invited you to join their Cleanway family
email.family_invite.preheader: Free protection on your devices, set up in 30 seconds.
email.family_invite.title: You've been invited to Cleanway Family
email.family_invite.body_p1: {{name}} added you to their Cleanway family plan. You get the same protection on up to 2 of your devices — for free.
email.family_invite.body_p2_security: This invitation is for you only — it expires in 72 hours. Your family admin can't see what you browse; only alerts when something dangerous is blocked on your device.
email.breach_alert.subject: Your email was found in a data breach
email.breach_alert.preheader: Change your password on affected sites soon.
email.breach_alert.title: Your email appeared in a new breach
email.breach_alert.body_p1: Your email was found in a recently disclosed data breach. This means your password on the affected site may be exposed.
email.breach_alert.body_p2_recommendatio: Change your password on that site now. If you use the same password elsewhere, change it there too. Consider a password manager — it's the only real fix.
email.subscription_cancel.subject: Your Cleanway subscription was canceled
email.subscription_cancel.title: We'll be here if you come back
email.subscription_cancel.body_p1: Your subscription has been canceled. Blocking scam sites continues to work for free — this is our ethical invariant, it won't change.
email.subscription_cancel.body_p2_keep_f: You'll keep your free-tier features: link scanning, block pages, email leak checks, and basic Privacy Audit grades.
email.granny_mode_invite.subject: {{name}} set up Cleanway protection for you
email.granny_mode_invite.preheader: Simple protection from scams — set up by your family.
email.granny_mode_invite.title: Safety from online scams — set up for you
email.granny_mode_invite.body_p1_to_gran: {{name}} set up Cleanway protection on your devices with extra-large text and voice alerts. You don't need to do anything — it's already working.
email.granny_mode_invite.body_p2_what_it: When a scammer tries to trick you with a fake bank website or delivery notice, Cleanway stops it before you enter anything. A clear warning shows in big letters: 'STOP — this is a scam site'.
email.granny_mode_invite.reassurance: If you're not sure what to do, tap the 'Ask family' button in the app — {{name}} gets a message and can help.
